funFacts: Coelophysis Hunt in Prehistoric Forest was a small, slender dinosaur that lived during the Late Triassic period, making it one of the earliest dinosaurs.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing color harmony and edge precision using wax crayons or markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
